# User template — Website multi-block (EN request → AR output)

## Placeholders

`{{brand}}` `{{sector}}` `{{pages}}` `{{tone}}` `{{seo_notes}}` `{{differentiators}}`

## Template

"Website Arabic copy for `{{brand}}`, sector `{{sector}}`. Pages: `{{pages}}`. Unified tone: `{{tone}}`. SEO notes: `{{seo_notes}}`. Differentiators to stress: `{{differentiators}}`.  
Deliver each page with placeholder H1 + paragraph draft + page-level CTA."

## Filled example

"Branded furnished apartments in the New Administrative Capital. Pages: Home, About, Units, Location, FAQ, Contact. **Professional Premium**. SEO: serviced apartments NAC. Differentiators: up to 10y payment plan, club view, delivery 2027."
